scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/shared run build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/web run dev" "pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/api run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/shared run build && pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/api run build && pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/web run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/api run typecheck && pnpm --filter @laundry-palu/web run typecheck
